title: Gary Hulse
extract: Gary Hulse (born 20 January 1981) is a former professional rugby league footballer who played in the 2000s and 2010s. He played at representative level for Great Britain (Under-21s (Academy)), and Wales, and at club level for Warrington Wolves, Widnes Vikings, Rochdale Hornets and Swinton Lions, as a fullback, stand-off, or scrum-half.
